Home / Construction Services
Services

Construction Services

Expert commercial construction built on trust, value, and 20+ years of proven experience.

Building Excellence Across Every Commercial Sector

At Northway Construction, we prioritize trust, value, and service above all else. We provide service that is second to none with over 20 years of experience and leadership to deliver superb, custom projects to all of our customers.

From retail stores to industrial warehouses, office buildings to tenant improvements—we bring the same commitment to quality, attention to detail, and client partnership to every project. Our experienced team manages every aspect of construction so you can focus on your business while we handle the building.

What We Build

Commercial Construction Expertise

Retail Construction

From standalone stores to multi-tenant retail centers, we understand the unique demands of retail construction. We coordinate MEP systems, storefront installations, and interior finishes while minimizing disruption to adjacent tenants and maintaining tight schedules for your opening date.

Office Buildings

Ground-up office construction and commercial renovations designed for modern workplace needs. We specialize in creating functional, attractive office environments with careful attention to technology infrastructure, HVAC systems, and energy efficiency.

Industrial & Warehouse

Heavy-duty construction for manufacturing, distribution, and warehouse facilities. We handle large clear spans, high bay construction, loading dock coordination, and industrial-grade utilities. Our experience includes concrete tilt-up, structural steel, and specialized industrial systems.

Tenant Improvements

Transform existing commercial space to meet your specific business needs. Whether it's a medical clinic, professional office, or retail space, we excel at tenant improvement work that maximizes your space while coordinating with building management and adjacent tenants.

Commercial Renovations

Update and modernize existing commercial buildings. We handle everything from cosmetic refreshes to comprehensive remodels involving structural modifications, systems upgrades, and code compliance improvements—all while working around your operational needs.

Ground-Up Construction

Complete new construction from foundation to final finishes. We manage site work, utilities, building envelope, interior systems, and all trades to deliver a turnkey facility ready for your operation. Our comprehensive approach ensures seamless coordination at every phase.

How We Work

The Northway Construction Process

Dedicated Project Management

Every project receives a dedicated project manager who serves as your single point of contact. They coordinate all trades, manage the schedule, handle problem-solving, and keep you informed with regular updates. You'll know exactly who to call and what's happening at every stage.

Quality Craftsmanship

We work with skilled, reliable trade partners we've built relationships with over two decades. Our standards for quality are non-negotiable, and we conduct regular inspections to ensure work meets both code requirements and our own elevated expectations.

Transparent Communication

No surprises. We provide detailed proposals, clear change order processes, and regular progress updates. When challenges arise—as they do on any construction project—we communicate proactively with solutions, not just problems.

Safety First

We maintain comprehensive safety programs and ensure all work complies with OSHA requirements and industry best practices. A safe jobsite is a productive jobsite, and we take our responsibility to workers and the community seriously.

On-Time, On-Budget Delivery

Our reputation is built on delivering what we promise. Through careful planning, proactive management, and decades of experience, we consistently complete projects on schedule and within budget. When you work with Northway, you can plan your business around reliable completion dates.

Our Work

Retail Construction

MIT Retail Building

Modern retail facility with efficient layout and quality finishes in Auburn, WA.
Industrial Construction

Heavy-duty industrial facility built to demanding specifications.
Commercial Renovation

UTC Office Building

View All Projects

Why Choose Northway for Your Construction Project?

20+ Years of Proven Experience

Two decades in commercial construction means we've encountered and solved virtually every challenge. Our experience translates to smoother projects, better problem-solving, and construction that's built to last.

Direct Owner Involvement

You'll work directly with Mr. Fry and our experienced leadership team. We're not a faceless corporation—we're a team that takes personal pride in every project and stands behind our work.

Multi-State Capabilities

With offices in Washington and Utah, we bring regional expertise combined with the resources and capability to serve projects across the Pacific Northwest and Mountain West.

Flexible Project Scale

Unlike large nationals that only pursue mega-projects, or small contractors with limited capacity, we handle projects of all sizes—from 5,000 sq ft tenant improvements to 100,000+ sq ft ground-up construction.

Client-Focused Partnership

We view every project as a partnership, not a transaction. Our success is measured by your satisfaction and the quality of the facility we deliver. Many of our clients return to us for project after project—the ultimate testament to our service.

Common Questions

Construction Services FAQs

What types of commercial construction projects do you handle?

Northway Construction handles a comprehensive range of commercial construction projects including retail centers and stores, office buildings and corporate spaces, industrial facilities and warehouses, tenant improvements and build-outs, commercial renovations and remodels, and ground-up construction. We've successfully completed projects ranging from 5,000 to 100,000+ square feet across multiple commercial sectors.

How do you ensure projects stay on schedule and budget?

We combine thorough pre-construction planning with proactive project management. Each project has a dedicated project manager who monitors progress daily, coordinates all trades, manages the schedule, and addresses issues before they become delays. Our 20+ years of experience helps us anticipate challenges and maintain momentum. We provide regular updates and transparent communication so you always know where your project stands.

Can you work with my existing architect or design team?

Absolutely. We regularly collaborate with architects, engineers, and design professionals chosen by our clients. Our team is skilled at working within established design-bid-build or design-build frameworks. We bring constructability expertise and practical insights that complement the design process, ensuring smooth coordination from plans to completed construction.

Do you handle permits and inspections?

Yes. As a full-service general contractor, we manage all permitting, inspections, and regulatory compliance for your project. We have established relationships with building departments throughout Washington and Utah, and we handle all the coordination and documentation required to keep your project moving through the approval process.

Ready to Build?

Let's discuss your commercial construction project and how we can deliver exceptional results.
